uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json
completion_criteria: Agents can list relevant aids with one compact command.
Discovery output includes type, status, scope, portability, entrypoint, and safety summary.
Retired aids do not appear as recommended actions.
Candidate aids do not masquerade as canonical proof routes.

execution_run.what happened: Added compact agent aid discovery through report --section agent_aids and task-specific recommendations through the existing skills command, with docs/defaults routing.
execution_run.scope touched: workspace report and skills payloads, tests, docs, and planning closeout

durable_residue.learned constraint: Aid discovery should reuse compact report and skills selectors instead of adding startup burden or a new top-level command.

closure_check.reopen trigger: Agents cannot list or recommend non-retired aids compactly, or candidate/retired aids appear as canonical required actions.
